                   +---------+
               +-->|  Arrow  |
               |   +---------+
               |
               |   +--------+
               +---|  Open  |
               |   +--------+
               |
               |   +---------+
               +-->|  Thick  |
+-------+      |   +---------+
|  Hub  +------+
+-------+      |   +----------+
               +-->|  Dotted  |
               |   +----------+
               |
               |   +----------+
               +--o|  Circle  |
               |   +----------+
               |
               |   +---------+
               +--x|  Cross  |
                   +---------+
